calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Sep-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for and with Andrea Leung (petitioner) by zoom.
Jeffrey Fried (son) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Ms. Alavi stated that Mr. Schultz is out of the Country, that they received an e-mail from Mr. Fried expressing some concerns, and requested a three-week continuance to allow Mr. Schultz and Mr. Fried to consult and resolve any concerns. The Spousal Property Petition is continued to September 6, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
